news.title: Global Market: European shares edge higher as miners, airlines offset tech weakness; benchmark set for weekly loss
news.description: European shares saw minimal change as mining and travel stocks gained. Technology shares declined, weighing on the broader market's performance. Investors remained cautious due to renewed Middle East geopolitical tensions. EasyJet shares surged significantly after a takeover approach was revealed.

news.title: Anthropic has soared to a $1.2 trillion valuation on secondary markets. Shares are almost impossible to get.
news.description: Anthropic has soared to a $1.2 trillion valuation on a popular secondary exchange as investors clamor to get shares in the AI startup before it goes public.

news.title: Selling gold in 2026? Your holding period could decide how much tax you pay
news.description: Gold ETFs, gold mutual funds and physical gold are taxed differently, with holding periods ranging from 12 to 24 months to qualify for lower long-term capital gains tax. Selling too soon could result in gains being taxed at your income-tax slab rate instead.
